'''''Swift Dreams''''' was one of the six hundred captured refugee [[Starship/Legends|ships]] that the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] war [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] used as shields against the defending [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces and as [[ramship]]s against the [[Capital/Legends|capital's]] [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]] during the opening stages of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. It was destroyed by [[Warship/Legends|warships]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]].

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
